rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Cross-Complaint Against Mark Minh Dai And Wendy Lo
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 4, 2017 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT AMI QI's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Cross-Complaint Against Mark Minh Dai And Wendy Lo Continued to December 8, 2017. Parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings to Department 501 no later than 9:30 a.m. on December 4, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 4, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF KELLY KIMBALL's Motion For Leave To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants DENIED without prejudice in light of November 30, 2017 ruling on Defendant's motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT E. DE LA CRUZ ET AL VS. MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 4, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Oregon, Washington, and Arkansas authorities cited by Plaintiff are not binding and do not on point. Plaintiff has not shown that there is a problem with the chain of ownership based on AHMA not being a MERS member and in light of the contractual provision. = (501/LOT)
